discovery_policy.disabled_skill_rule: Disabled skill directories MUST NOT contain SKILL.md; preserved docs live only in SKILL.disabled.md.

active_skills.name: bears-blocker-eval
active_skills.description: Classify Bears workflow-overlay risks, blockers, and unblock paths.

active_skills.name: bears-deploy-gate
active_skills.description: Assess deploy, rollback, runtime, and secret impact for Bears workflow-overlay changes.

active_skills.name: bears-goal-prompt
active_skills.description: Generate bounded and verifiable Codex goal prompts for Bears work.

active_skills.name: bears-codex-health
active_skills.description: Diagnose Codex desktop/app-server freezes, MCP fan-out, session growth, and safe evidence-first remediation planning.

active_skills.name: bears-governance-check
active_skills.description: Run Bears workflow-overlay governance routing checks before boundary edits.

active_skills.name: bears-role-gate
active_skills.description: Validate or emit Bears role-coverage packets and ROLE_COVERAGE_BLOCKER results.

active_skills.name: bears-workflow-validate
active_skills.description: Validate Bears workflow-overlay skill, README, schema-packet, and workflow boundaries.

active_skills.name: development-workflow-orchestration
active_skills.description: Coordinate broad Bears development workflow through validated packets and domain orchestrators.

active_skills.name: platform-role-governance
active_skills.description: Enforce the canonical Bears plugin-owned platform role gate.

active_skills.name: python-codeflow
active_skills.description: Enforce Bears Python codeflow, src layout, Clean/Hexagonal boundaries, runtime module splitting, validation, docs, tests, and gitflow hygiene.

active_skills.name: project-mandate
active_skills.description: Run the registry-gated project artifact checklist after project registry gate approval.

active_skills.name: secret-factory
active_skills.description: Govern write-only local secret generation and Infisical creation with provider handoff refusals.

active_skills.name: speckit-bears-flow
active_skills.description: Run the Bears opinionated Spec Kit orchestration flow.

active_skills.name: speckit-bears-research
active_skills.description: Produce Spec Kit-style research artifacts for Bears projects.

active_skills.name: yandex360-dns
active_skills.description: DNS governance workflow for bears.ru through Yandex 360 using presence-only checks, dry-run plan review, and read-only governance evidence only.

active_skills.name: bears-kubernetes-ops
active_skills.description: Perform Bears Kubernetes metadata checks, desired-state/local_cd deploy-boundary checks, secret-reference readiness, and dev-instance runtime placement guidance.

active_skills.name: bears-infisical-ops
active_skills.description: Perform Bears Infisical names-only readiness, ExternalSecret provider handoff, and Telegram session custody checks without exposing secret values.
